channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Ford to donate $1M, fleet of vehicles to Trump inauguration
item.description: Ford Motor Company said it will donate $1 million and a small fleet of vehicles for use in President-elect Trump’s inauguration, multiple outlets reported Monday. Ford joins a recent wave of major tech companies that have pledged hefty donations to the incoming president’s inaugural fund.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Trump Administration Charts Course for AI Use in Government
item.description: The incoming Trump administration is taking a different approach to artificial intelligence use in government compared to the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy
item.description: DHS’ OCIO provides two major services. It acts as the CIO for the management zone, providing endpoints, services and delivery to the CXOs. The post DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden
item.description: Jane Rathbun, the Department of the Navy’s CIO, said tools from NSA and NCIS along with a new initiative could help small firms meet CMMC requirements. The post Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Who’s who in Donald Trump’s new Silicon Valley entourage
item.description: There’s a larger coterie of tech world Trump supporters who are now working with the incoming administration, with varying degrees of formality.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: AI will eavesdrop on world's wildest places to track and help protect endangered wildlife
item.description: A biologist hid 350 audio monitors across Costa Rica’s tropical rainforests to spy on endangered spider monkeys in order to help protect them.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Top 5 mistakes that could expose your financial data to cybercriminals
item.description: There are common habits and oversights that could leave your financial information vulnerable to cybercriminals, according to Kurt the CyberGuy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe aims to fly closer to the sun like never before
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A NASA spacecraft aims to fly closer to the sun than any object sent before. The Parker Solar Probe was launched in 2018 to get a close-up look at the sun. Since then, it has flown straight through the sun's corona: the outer atmosphere visible during a total solar eclipse.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Flexibility or security? Trick question: It’s a false choice. Here’s what to do instead
item.description: Remember when 'work' was a place? Federal agencies rethink BYOD to balance security and usability. The post Flexibility or security? Trick question: It’s a false choice. Here’s what to do instead first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot
item.description: In today's Federal Newscast, Homeland Security has rolled out its own generative AI chatbot, now available to roughly 19,000 employees. The post Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: That new Copilot key on your keyboard? It’s useless for business
item.description: Microsoft’s genAI-based Copilot app for Windows doesn’t work with Microsoft’s identity and access management platform Entra, prompting the company to advise organizations to uninstall the app and reconfigure the Copilot keyboard key to open the Microsoft 365 app instead.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Supreme Court takes up challenge to TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court announced it will take up whether a law that could ban TikTok nationwide violates the First Amendment, setting the stage for a fast-paced, high-stakes battle over free speech.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Apple updates its IT training courses for latest OS updates
item.description: Apple has updated an essential enterprise product — its IT training courses, which have now been updated for the latest iterations of its operating systems, iOS 18, iPadOS 18, and macOS Sequoia.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Using VPNs without messing up your banking apps
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says a VPN enhances online banking security by encrypting data and protecting privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Smarter devops: How to avoid deployment horrors
item.description: Many devops organizations implement advanced CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and other automations to increase deployment frequency. In the State of DevOps Report 2023, 18% of respondents were classified as elite performers for being able to deploy on-demand with change lead times of less than a day.
item.dc:creator: Info World
